query_title: Lady Snowblood 2: Love Song of Vengeance

recommendations.title: Charlie Says

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Who Killed Captain Alex?
recommendations.overview: Recognized as Uganda’s first action film, Who Killed Captain Alex? is about the aftermath of a police raid in Kampala in which a police captain is killed.

recommendations.title: The Fugitive
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murdering his wife and sentenced to death, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find the real killer and clear his name.

recommendations.title: Lust, Caution
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a secret agent must seduce and assassinate an official who works for the Japanese puppet government in Shanghai.

recommendations.title: London Has Fallen
recommendations.overview: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning discovers a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

recommendations.title: Men in Black
recommendations.overview: After a police chase with an otherworldly being, a New York City cop is recruited as an agent in a top-secret organization established to monitor and police alien activity on Earth: the Men in Black. Agent K and new recruit Agent J find themselves in

recommendations.title: Most Wanted
recommendations.overview: A Marine on death row is recruited by a shadowy U.S. military officer as part of a top-secret ops team, then gets framed for murder when the team and its officer set him up as the fall guy for the assassination of the First Lady.

recommendations.title: Overhaul
recommendations.overview: When truck racer Roger loses everything, he receives a tempting but dangerous offer: to work as the getaway driver for a gang of thieves.

recommendations.title: White Boy Rick
recommendations.overview: The story of Richard Wershe Jr., a teenager who became an undercover informant for the police during the 1980s, and was ultimately arrested for drug trafficking and sentenced to life in prison.
